repo_prior_art.cite: pid_benefit_concordance_band: rank-concordance-band partial-ID envelope for a different cross-world functional

published_prior_art.cite: ChaogeHanLiuWu2026 gives continuous GPN Frechet and parametric-copula sensitivity bounds; copula-local-bound papers give noncausal pointwise concordance envelopes
ChaogeHanLiuWu2026: Gaussian/parametric copula sensitivity path for continuous GPN
ChaogeHanLiuWu2026: continuous GPN Frechet bounds under no dependence information

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_benefit_concordance_band: bootstrap/delta-method endpoint inference for a Spearman outer envelope

published_prior_art.cite: HeLi2026 gives fixed-parametric-copula EIFs; DornGuoKallus2022 gives different ATE sensitivity endpoint estimation

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_benefit_concordance_band: prior concordance-band run left active-switch endpoint inference as open

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovLeeRosen2013 supplies generic intersection-bound inference, not Kendall-band GPN curve inference

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1 / thm:sharp-tau-band-gpn
novelty_flags.one_line: The load-bearing Kendall-tau envelope source is not cited directly; add the primary local-bound papers such as Bounds on bivariate distribution functions with given margins and measures of association (2001) and A comparison of bounds on sets of joint distribution functions derived from various measures of association (2004), since UbedaFlores2025 and KokolBukovsekKosirMojskercOmladic2021 are mainly Gini/footrule papers that point back to those Kendall results.

novelty_flags.label: Proposition 2 / prop:frechet-reduction
novelty_flags.one_line: The Frechet reduction is already the no-dependence-information continuous GPN benchmark in ChaogeHanLiuWu2026, so keep it as a sanity corollary rather than a novel proposition.

soundness_flags.label: target_estimand and thm:sharp-tau-band-gpn
soundness_flags.one_line: The stated target conditions on A=1,Y>=c1, but the endpoint formula is an unweighted population ratio; under observational unconfoundedness the correct treated-event target needs e(X)-weighted numerator and denominator, unless the proposal retargets the population GPN or assumes constant randomization.

soundness_flags.label: ass:treated-margin-continuity / ass:control-margin-continuity / C_x
soundness_flags.one_line: Continuity only at c1 and c0 is not enough to make the full conditional copula C_x and Kendall's tau restriction unique; require continuous conditional margins, or explicitly fix a copula version for laws with atoms.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: ass:conditional-tau-band
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The constant conditional Kendall-tau band is accepted as a novel sensitivity regime, not a derived restriction.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Sharpness and inference claims are conditional on the P_X-a.e. conditional Kendall-band restriction.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: ass:regular-piece-lower / ass:regular-piece-upper
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Scalar EIF regularity is restricted to locally smooth single-active-piece regimes away from copula-envelope kinks.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The EIF and root-n one-step claims are conditional on active-piece uniqueness; kink and switching regimes remain covered only by the separate uniform-inference conjecture.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Choose one target and make all formulas match it: either retarget theta to the population GPN P(Y(0)<c0 | Y(1)>=c1), or insert e(X)-weighted versions of pi1, nu_L, nu_U, the EIFs, and the one-step estimators for the treated-event estimand.
Replace the secondary Kendall-bound citations with the primary local-bound sources and state exactly which theorem/equation supplies b_plus and b_minus for fixed Kendall tau and for a tau interval.
Downgrade prop:frechet-reduction to an explicit sanity corollary and use the saved novelty budget to add a boundary corollary comparing conditional versus unconditional Kendall-tau restrictions.
Strengthen the margin regularity assumptions to full conditional continuity or add a version-selection convention for C_x so the Kendall-tau band is not copula-version dependent.

recommended_next_step: Continue revise on this angle: fix the target/formula mismatch and cite the primary Kendall local-bound literature before advancing to Stage 0.
